hero.headline: Built by Someone Who's Been Where You Are
hero.subheadline: Not an algorithm. Not an influencer. A Doctor, veteran, and fitness director who built the coach he wished he had.

modes.title: Coaching Built for YOUR Reality
modes.subtitle: Most apps build for the average person. You are not average.
modes.glp1_desc: Muscle preservation, fatigue-aware programming, and nutrition guidance designed specifically for clients on weight-loss medications.
modes.veteran_desc: Discipline-driven programming that respects your service, your injuries, and the battles that do not always show up on an MRI.
modes.injury_desc: Torn shoulder? Knee surgery? Plantar fasciitis? Train around it — not through it — with AI that adjusts every session.
modes.general_desc: Goal-driven, AI-personalized programming for any level, any schedule, any starting point.

about.title: Your Coach
about.name: Dr. Michael P. Lovato, EdD
about.credentials: Army Veteran · Fitness Director · Doctor of Education · 30+ AI Certifications · NASM Certified
about.bio: I built AdaptFit because I kept seeing the same gap — smart, motivated people getting failed by generic apps that knew nothing about their injuries, their medications, or their invisible battles. I have trained through a torn shoulder, a surgically repaired knee, plantar fasciitis, and more. I know what it means to show up anyway.

onboarding.step1_sub: Tell us about yourself so your AI coach can build the right plan from day one.
onboarding.flags_label: Any of these apply to you?
onboarding.flag_glp1: I am on a GLP-1 medication (Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, etc.)
onboarding.flag_veteran: I am a veteran or active military
onboarding.flag_injury: I am training with an injury or post-surgery
onboarding.flag_ptsd: I am managing a mental health condition

auth.signup_sub: Free to start. No credit card required.

errors.password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
